name: data-collection
description: Open-H-Embodiment is a community‑driven dataset initiative building the open, shared foundation needed to train and evaluate a generalist Vision‑Language‑Action (VLA) model for healthcare robotics
summaryZh: Open-H-Embodiment is a community‑driven dataset initiative building the open, shared foundation needed to train and evaluate a generalist Vision‑Language‑Action (VLA) model for healthcare robotics 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
